steps.title: Identify the needed boundary
steps.content: The first part says roundworms move in opposite directions when searching for food. The next part explains why: Earth's magnetic field points down in the Northern Hemisphere but up in the Southern Hemisphere.

steps.title: Use explanation punctuation
steps.content: Choice B creates a comma splice between independent clauses. Choice C uses while even though the second clause explains the first instead of showing a simultaneous action. Choice D leaves the two clauses without a proper boundary. The answer is A.
